data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Invoice generation from approved timesheet'. However, the evidence does not include any concrete API reads or checks that confirm this functionality is implemented or working as intended. The linked use case describes the process but does not provide sufficient evidence of the actual API behavior or state validation needed to confirm the requirement is met.
gaps: No evidence of the actual API or system behavior confirming that invoices can be generated from approved timesheets.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for invoice generation API
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the invoice generation from an approved timesheet.
